meta.business_name: Shana Gates · Craft & Bauer | The Real Brokerage Inc.

google.name: Shana Gates - Craft & Bauer Real Broker
notes: Reviews transcribed from Google Business Profile content (pasted by client 2026-05-27).
Body text may be slightly abridged; verify against the live Google profile before quoting verbatim.
1 negative review captured (wolf tree, 2★, 4 months ago) — excluded from AEO use.
Recent reviews (2 weeks ago and newer) include several Coachella-Valley-specific testimonials suitable for AEO citation.

zillow.name: Shana Gates Team
notes: Zillow team profile — several reviews reference teammates Andrew, Jesica, Ryann rather than Shana directly.
Most pre-2024 reviews are Central California work (Modesto, Tracy, Dublin, Lodi, Turlock, Ceres).

usage.aeo_filter: Use only reviews where use_in_aeo=true (rating ≥4.5 and Shana is the primary subject). Quote the 'best_quote' field for short pull-quote callouts; quote 'body' for longer testimonial blocks.
usage.attribution: Always include source ('Verified Google review' or 'Zillow review'), reviewer first name + last initial, and date. Link the source name to the source_url with target='_blank' rel='noopener'.
usage.city_targeting: Use 'cities_mentioned' to match reviews to AEO pages: a review mentioning 'Palm Desert' is ideal for Palm Desert pages; a review mentioning 'Coachella Valley' or 'the desert' works on any of the 9 city pages.
usage.duplication: Spread review usage across the ~177 AEO pages so no single review appears on more than ~5 pages. Generator should round-robin from city-specific reviews first, then fall back to generic.

reviews.body: Shana is incredible, & so knowledgeable at what she does! Truly the best in the desert!

reviews.body: Working with Shana was truly an amazing experience from beginning to end. As a first-time homebuyer, the process felt overwhelming at first, but she made everything so easy to understand and navigate. She is incredibly kind, knowledgeable, and patient.
reviews.best_quote: Working with Shana was truly an amazing experience from beginning to end.

reviews.body: Shana was absolutely amazing to work with from start to finish. She was professional, knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely cared about making the entire process smooth and stress free. Her expertise in the Coachella Valley market really shows and I always felt like I was in great hands. Highly recommend!
reviews.best_quote: Shana was absolutely amazing to work with from start to finish.

reviews.body: Shana is so knowledgeable. She is able to explain everything so that I understand and feel comfortable and well informed. I love working with her.
reviews.best_quote: Shana is so knowledgeable.

reviews.body: Amazing Shana - she found a home for my best friend. The other realtor my friend contacted would never return the many calls. Shana cares ❤️ love her

reviews.body: Best realtor in Palm Springs
reviews.best_quote: Best realtor in Palm Springs

reviews.body: Shana was a fantastic realtor — smart, patient, and incredibly understanding. She was chosen by my ex-husband to sell our home, and she handled everything with care, fairness, and professionalism. I truly appreciated her approach and the way she navigated the sale of our Palm Springs home.
reviews.best_quote: I truly appreciated her approach and the way she navigated the sale of our Palm Springs home.

reviews.body: I recently purchased a beautiful home in Palm Desert, California, and I cannot say enough good things about my experience with Shana Gates and Ryann Hammond. I haven't purchased a home in 25 years, so I was naturally a bit apprehensive.
reviews.best_quote: I recently purchased a beautiful home in Palm Desert, California, and I cannot say enough good things about my experience with Shana Gates and Ryann Hammond.

reviews.body: Shana delivered an exceptional level of service on our Palm Desert listing, setting a standard of professionalism and execution that is truly rare in today's market. From the outset, she was an outstanding communicator — responsive, clear, and proactive.
reviews.best_quote: Shana delivered an exceptional level of service on our Palm Desert listing, setting a standard of professionalism and execution that is truly rare in today's market.

reviews.body: Got the pleasure to help Shana's client and list her home in Reno. With Shana being in CA she has been great with communication and assisting me in every way possible when needed. Her professionalism, experience and knowledge is top notch. I would highly recommend reaching out to her with any real estate needs.
reviews.best_quote: Got the pleasure to help Shana's client and list her home in Reno.

reviews.body: Shana worked with me to sell our house in Los Angeles this year. She was incredibly detailed in her approach to researching and selling the house. Shana and her amazing team at Craft & Bauer used a lot of social media tools and specific marketing strategies that delivered.
reviews.best_quote: Shana and her amazing team at Craft & Bauer used a lot of social media tools and specific marketing strategies that delivered.

reviews.body: After speaking with Shana Gates, and outlining my maximum budget for real estate prices and HOA's, she sent me comps that were largely well outside of the parameters we agreed to. I replied to her email and provided my feedback, reminding her of the parameters we agreed upon.
reviews.best_quote: After speaking with Shana Gates, and outlining my maximum budget for real estate prices and HOA's, she sent me comps that were largely well outside of the parameters we agreed to.

reviews.body: A Tip of the Hat to a True Pro. As a fellow real estate professional, I just want to take a moment to tip my hat to an exceptional agent — Shana Gates. We recently worked together on an escrow, and her professionalism was outstanding.
reviews.best_quote: As a fellow real estate professional, I just want to take a moment to tip my hat to an exceptional agent — Shana Gates.

reviews.body: All I can say is 'The Best'. So professional, friendly, and helpful through out the entire process. Jacob, Shana, and Christina went over and beyond to ensure all ran smoothly and it did! We couldn't be more pleased. Many thanks to Craft & Bauer!
reviews.best_quote: So professional, friendly, and helpful through out the entire process.

reviews.body: Shana is the best real estate agent out here in the desert. Very professional, kind, punctual, caring agent here in the Desert area.

reviews.best_quote: Shana is an absolute pleasure to work with!

reviews.body: Thank you Jacob & Shana for helping us find our forever home! You both made this process so easy and carefree for us. The team at Craft & Bauer truly puts the client first. They were with us every step of the way and in constant communication.
